text:
About
I am a Research Engineer and Faculty Research Assistant at the Collaborative Robotics and Intelligent Systems (CoRIS) Institute, Oregon State University, where I work on Materials and Soft Robotics.
I completed my undergraduate studies in [Your Undergrad Degree] at [Your Undergrad University], where I first developed my interest in [brief interest]. I then pursued my graduate studies at [Your Grad University], focusing on [Your Grad Research Focus].
Following my graduate studies, I joined CoRIS as a Faculty Research Assistant, working closely with [Advisor Name if applicable] on [brief description of FRA work]. My work broadly sits at the intersection of [your research themes].
